experience_band: 5–9 years total; sweet spot 6–8 yrs with 4–5 in applied ML
must_haves: Production ML at product companies — shipped systems with real users
End-to-end ownership of ranking, search, or recommendation systems
Embeddings-based retrieval and vector search experience
Domain depth in: information retrieval, recommendation systems, nlp
hard_disqualifiers: Consulting-only career (Tcs/Infosys/Wipro/Accenture/Cognizant/Capgemini/Tech Mahindra) — product ownership never demonstrated
Research-only background — published papers but nothing shipped to production
"AI experience" = LangChain wrapper calling OpenAI API built in < 12 months
Non-engineer career path (PM, QA, Marketing, Sales, HR, Ops) with no ML code
No code written in the last 18 months — moved to pure architecture / tech-lead
Current title is a non-engineering role: Marketing Manager, Hr Manager, Content Writer, Graphic Designer, etc.
ideal_signals: Deployed embedding-based retrieval to real users
RecSys shipped end-to-end at product scale
Search system with measurable recall/precision metrics
Built offline eval infra (NDCG, MAP) + A/B testing
A/B testing experience — knows how to validate ranking quality
behavioral_expectations: High recruiter response rate — actually reachable (30% weight)
Actively open to work on platform (25% weight)
Logged in within last 90 days — not a ghost profile (20% weight)
Shows up when scheduled — low ghosting risk (15% weight)
Complete profile — signals platform engagement (10% weight)
location_preferences: Preferred cities (India): Pune, Noida, Delhi, Delhi Ncr, New Delhi, Gurgaon, Hyderabad, Mumbai
Notice period: ≤ 30d ideal; ≤ 60d in scope; >90d penalised heavily
Relocation bonus applied for candidates willing to move to preferred cities
Outside India: case-by-case; no work-visa sponsorship
key_traps: Profiles with 'AI/ML' in skills section but career is non-engineering (PM, QA, Sales)
Consulting careers (TCS/Infosys/Wipro) with 'ML projects' that are PoC / billable work, not shipped products
Honeypot profiles with impossible tenure (e.g., 48 months at a company founded 12 months ago)
"GenAI experience" = prompting or wrapping an LLM API for < 1 year, no retrieval depth
Research scientists with strong papers but zero production deployments
Tech leads who last wrote production code 2+ years ago — titled Senior but no longer hands-on
